toast.mappingPromptOnHint: You'll be asked to map new folders.
toast.mappingPromptOffHint: New-folder prompts are off — unmapped folders still use your default Starter set.
toast.networkAccessOnHint: Gateway will bind 0.0.0.0 — restart it to become reachable on your network.
toast.networkAccessOffHint: Gateway will bind 127.0.0.1 — restart it to return to this machine only.
toast.authDisabledHint: Authentication is off — local apps can connect with no access key.
toast.authRequiredHint: Authentication is required again for inbound connections.
toast.webAdminEnabled: Browse http://127.0.0.1:{{port}}. Run pnpm build:web:admin after UI changes, then hard-refresh.
toast.failedWebAdmin: Failed to save web admin settings
toast.gatewayRestartForPort: Restart the gateway for port {{port}} to take effect.
toast.gatewayNextStartPort: Next gateway start will use port {{port}}.
toast.publicUrlHint: Remote clients via Cloudflare Tunnel will use this URL for OAuth discovery.
toast.gatewayFellBack: Saved port was unavailable — now running on :{{port}} instead.
toast.gatewayPortActive: The new port is now active.
toast.metaToolsEnabledDesc: Connected MCP clients will see the mcpmux_* toolset on next list_tools.
toast.metaToolsDisabledDesc: mcpmux_* is hidden from connected MCP clients.

startup.title: Startup & System Tray
startup.description: Control how McpMux starts and behaves with the system tray.
startup.autoLaunchDesc: Start McpMux automatically when you log in to your system
startup.startMinimizedDesc: Launch in background to system tray (requires auto-launch enabled)
startup.closeToTrayDesc: Keep running in system tray when window is closed (use "Quit" from tray to exit)

gateway.title: Gateway
gateway.description: The local port every AI client connects to. Changing it takes effect on the next gateway start — existing IDE configs pointing at the old port will need updating.
gateway.portDescDefault: Default is {{port}}. Use a port between 1024 and 65535.
gateway.publicUrlDesc: HTTPS hostname for remote MCP clients via Cloudflare Tunnel. OAuth discovery uses this when requests arrive with matching X-Forwarded-Host. Local clients keep using localhost.
gateway.restartHint: Saved port :{{saved}} doesn't match the running port :{{active}}. Restart the gateway to apply — your IDE configs will need to point at the new URL.
gateway.webAdminDesc: Serves the UI + REST API on loopback for remote access (e.g. Cloudflare Tunnel). Use http://127.0.0.1:{{port}} — not the Vite dev URL on :1420 unless admin is enabled and proxied.
gateway.enableWebAdminDesc: Starts HTTP server on this Mac (default port 45819).
gateway.trustCfAccessDesc: Required for tunnel exposure; disable for local-only testing.
gateway.cfTeamDomainDesc: Set this before enabling Trust CF Access JWT. Just the team slug (e.g. your-team), not the full URL.

machineIdentity.title: Machine Identity
machineIdentity.description: Identify this McpMux install among your homelab boxes and cloud agents.
machineIdentity.notRegistered: This install has no machine identity yet. Register one on the Projects page, or create one below.
machineIdentity.confirmDeleteMessage: Remove "{{name}}"? Bindings scoped to this machine will become global.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the look and feel of McpMux.

metaTools.title: Self-management tools (mcpmux_*)
metaTools.description: When enabled, connected MCP clients see a fixed meta-tool surface (~14 tools) for search → schema → invoke and search → read/fetch workflows. FeatureSets control what is invokable/readable/fetchable; optional surfaced items can appear directly in tools/list, resources/list, or prompts/list. Writes always trigger a native approval dialog; reads are silent.
metaTools.advertiseDesc: Shows mcpmux_search_tools, mcpmux_invoke_tool, mcpmux_search_resources, and other meta tools to every connected MCP client. Turn off to hide the whole namespace.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Help improve McpMux by sharing anonymous usage data. No personal information is collected.
analytics.shareDesc: Sends anonymous data like app version, OS, and feature usage to help us prioritize improvements. Location is approximated from IP by PostHog. No credentials or server configurations are shared.

contribute.title: Contribute & feedback
contribute.description: mcpmux is open source. Request a server, report a bug, suggest a feature, or jump straight to the source.
contribute.requestServerDesc: Ask the community to add an MCP server to the registry
contribute.reportBugDesc: Something broken in the desktop app or gateway

requestCta.title: Don't see what you need?
requestCta.descriptionDefault: Request a new server in the community registry, or add one yourself via a pull request.
requestCta.descriptionWithSearch: We couldn't find "{{searchTerm}}". Request it from the community registry or open a PR yourself.

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: View application logs for debugging and troubleshooting.
logs.autoCleanupDesc: Automatically delete log files older than the selected period
logs.footer: Logs are rotated daily. Each file contains detailed debug information including thread IDs and source locations.

viewer.title: Server Logs
viewer.openInEditorTitle: Open log file in external editor
viewer.copyAllTitle: Copy all visible logs to clipboard

confirm.clearMessage: Clear all logs for "{{serverName}}"? This cannot be undone.

toast.clearedBody: All logs for "{{serverName}}" have been cleared
toast.pathCopiedBody: Log file path copied to clipboard
toast.pathFailed: Failed to get log file path
toast.nothingToCopyBody: No logs match the current filter

serverUpdates.title: Server Updates
serverUpdates.description: Default update policy for newly installed npx and uvx servers. Override per server in Configure.
serverUpdates.neverChecked: No version check has run yet

policy.notifyDesc: Surface available updates without changing packages automatically
policy.autoDesc: Always resolve the latest package on reconnect (npx/uvx servers only)
policy.pinnedDesc: Lock to a specific version (configure per server)

toast.enableFirst: Enable servers on My Servers first
toast.eligibleHint: Only notify or auto npx/uvx servers are checked for updates
toast.updatesHint: Use the list below to update individual servers or all at once

updates.title: Software Updates
updates.description: Keep your application up to date with the latest features and fixes.
updates.restartDescription: Version v{{bundleVersion}} has been installed on disk, but you are still running v{{currentVersion}}. Restart to apply the update.
updates.windowsNote: Note: On Windows, the app will close automatically to install the update.

about.title: About McpMux
about.description: Version and build details for support and debugging.

buildStamp.webAdminMismatchTitle: Web admin UI is out of date
buildStamp.webAdminMismatchDescBefore: The served bundle ({{spaSha}}) does not match the running backend ({{backendSha}}). From the repo root run
buildStamp.desktopMismatchDesc: UI bundle ({{spaSha}}) differs from running app ({{backendSha}}).
